forecasts.reasoning: Based on my research, Discord has shown concrete progress toward an IPO: (1) Confidential SEC filing reported by Bloomberg on March 26, 2025, (2) Engagement of top-tier underwriters Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan, (3) CEO transition on April 23 ostensibly linked to IPO preparation. The timeline from confidential filing (March 26) to July 1 (97 days) gives them sufficient time to make a public announcement. While no definitive May updates exist in the search results, the executive change in late April suggests active ongoing work. The 55% probability reflects slightly better than even odds given the concrete steps taken, the tight but achievable timeline, and the lack of evidence of delays. However, IPOs frequently face delays and companies can confidentially file without ever proceeding to public announcement.
